title: Fiber FlowData
description: Schema for FlowData JSON — the output structure produced by FBRE (render engine) when a form is completed.

uuid.description: UUID of the flow this submission belongs to.

metadata.description: Metadata from the original flow, passed through as-is.

screens.description: Ordered list of screens that were visible at completion time.

calculations.description: Evaluated calculation results. Present only when the flow defines calculations.

ScreenData.description: Submitted data for a single screen.

label.description: Screen label. Present only when the screen has a non-empty label.

components.description: Submitted data for each data-bearing component on this screen.

ComponentData.description: Submitted data for a single component. The 'value' key is absent on container entries (group, repeater) and on a confirm that was ticked then unticked.

label.description: Component label. Present only when the component has a non-empty label.

type.description: Component type key. Display-only types (header, text, divider, callout, table) are never present in FlowData.

value.description: The collected value. Type varies by component — see documentation for per-type details. Absent on containers (group, repeater) and on an unticked confirm.

components.description: Container iterations. Present on group and repeater components. Outer array = iterations (a group has exactly one; a repeater has one per iteration), inner array = child components per iteration.

FileUploadData.description: Uploaded file data. Discriminated union on the 'mode' field.

FileUploadBase64Data.description: File uploaded as inline Base64 data. This is the default mode when no server-side storage is configured. FBRE emits this shape without a 'mode' field; the optional 'lastModifiedDate' passes through the deprecated File API property only when the browser provides it.

mode.description: Optional discriminant allowed by the TypeScript type. Never emitted by FBRE.

lastModifiedDate.description: Deprecated File API 'lastModifiedDate' value, present only when the browser provides it.

FileUploadS3Data.description: File uploaded to S3 or compatible object storage. Contains a reference to the stored file rather than inline data.

mode.description: Upload mode. Always 's3' for server-stored files.

CalculationData.description: Evaluated result of a flow-level calculation.

value.description: Numeric result of the calculation, or null if the formula could not be evaluated.

formattedValue.description: Pre-formatted display string (e.g. "$1,234.56", "75.00%"). Omitted when value is null.

RangeValue.description: A start/end pair used by range components (dateRange, timeRange, dateTimeRange).

start.description: Start value. Format depends on component type (date, time, or datetime).

end.description: End value. Same format as start.
